description_long: This is a life-sized model of an elderly man with a slender build, lying flat with arms slightly bent and hands open. He is dressed in a light tan or beige full-body suit, which appears to be a simple, unadorned garment, and wears dark shoes. His hands are gloved in white, contrasting with the rest of his attire. The man's hair is short and gray, and his facial features include a prominent nose, visible wrinkles, and a neutral expression. The overall appearance suggests a calm, passive demeanor, with no visible accessories or walking aids. The model is realistic in proportions and details, suitable for urban scene placement.
description: A realistic elderly man in a beige suit with white gloves and dark shoes, lying flat with a calm expression and short gray hair.
description_view_0: View from the feet looking toward the head, showing the soles of the shoes, the full length of the body, and the open hands.
description_view_1: Side profile from the left, highlighting the facial features, the contour of the body, and the relaxed arm position.
description_view_2: View from above the head looking down the body, showing the top of the head, shoulders, and the spread of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Side profile from the right, similar to view 1 but from the opposite side, showing the right side of the face and body.
attribute_clothing_style: Simple, light beige full-body suit with white gloves and dark shoes; no visible patterns or accessories.
attribute_posture: Lying flat on the back with arms slightly bent and legs extended.
attribute_facial_features: Prominent nose, visible wrinkles, no facial hair, neutral expression.
